evals.prompt: How do I set up an abandoned cart automation in Omnisend? I'm using Shopify.
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide to enabling the pre-built Abandoned Cart workflow with multi-channel steps

assertions.name: workflow_setup
assertions.description: Walks through enabling the pre-built Abandoned Cart workflow in Automation section

assertions.name: multi_channel
assertions.description: Recommends combining email and SMS steps in the workflow with appropriate timing delays

assertions.name: exit_conditions
assertions.description: Explains that the workflow auto-stops when the contact completes their purchase

evals.prompt: I want to grow my SMS subscriber list in Omnisend. What's the best approach?
evals.expected_output: SMS opt-in collection strategy using multi-step popups with compliance guidance

assertions.name: separate_consent
assertions.description: Explains that SMS requires separate opt-in consent from email

assertions.name: multi_step_popup
assertions.description: Recommends multi-step popup that collects email first then asks for SMS consent on second step

assertions.name: compliance
assertions.description: Covers TCPA compliance, quiet hours, and STOP keyword handling

evals.prompt: I'm building a custom ecommerce platform and need to integrate with Omnisend via API to sync products and track orders.
evals.expected_output: API integration guide for product sync, order tracking, and event-based automation

assertions.name: api_reference
assertions.description: Points to references/omnisend-api-reference.md for full API docs

assertions.name: auth_method
assertions.description: Explains X-API-KEY header authentication and Omnisend-Version header

assertions.name: event_tracking
assertions.description: Covers sending custom events via the Events API for cart/browse tracking to enable automation workflows
